title: Peppery Velvety Eggplant Stir-fry
description: A delicious and spicy Turkish dish featuring eggplants cooked in a creamy bhuna sauce with added jain-friendly elements for a velvety texture and peppery flavor, perfect as a solo dinner.
instructions: Chop the eggplant into cubes and slice the onion thinly.
In a pan, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped onions and fry until translucent.
Add sliced garlic and stir for about 30 seconds before adding finely chopped eggplants to sauté them gently in the remaining oil.
After 2 minutes of frying the eggplant, add red chili powder, turmeric powder, and salt. Stir well for another minute.
Pour tomato sauce over the mixture, reduce heat to low, and let it simmer for about 10 minutes or until most of the liquid is absorbed.
Stir in whipping cream and cook on medium-low for an additional 5-7 minutes until thickened and creamy. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
